# buridan/native

> Native HTML UI components you can copy, paste, and ship in minutes. Production-ready shadcn/ui blocks and components designed for Reflex. Extend, override, and ship without fighting the framework. Open source, no lock-in.

## Overview
- [Introduction](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/getting-started/introduction): Introduction page.
- [Installation](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/getting-started/installation): Installation page.
- [Skills](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/getting-started/skills): Skills page.
- [CLI](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/getting-started/cli): CLI page.
- [dev.py](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/getting-started/dev): dev.py page.
- [JavaScript](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/getting-started/javascript): JavaScript page.
- [Changelog](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/getting-started/changelog): Changelog page.

## Resources
- [Chart](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/resources/chart): Chart page.
- [Client State Var](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/resources/client-state-var): Client State Var page.
- [Events & Actions](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/resources/events): Events & Actions page.
- [State Structure](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/resources/state): State Structure page.
- [Theming](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/resources/theming): Theming page.
- [Typeset](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/resources/typeset): Typeset page.

## Components
- [Accordion](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/accordion): The Accordion component.
- [Attachment](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/attachment): The Attachment component.
- [Avatar](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/avatar): The Avatar component.
- [Badge](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/badge): The Badge component.
- [Bubble](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/bubble): The Bubble component.
- [Button](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/button): The Button component.
- [Button Group](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/button-group): The Button Group component.
- [Card](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/card): The Card component.
- [Checkbox](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/checkbox): The Checkbox component.
- [Dialog](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/dialog): The Dialog component.
- [Field](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/field): The Field component.
- [Frame](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/frame): The Frame component.
- [Input](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/input): The Input component.
- [Input Group](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/input-group): The Input Group component.
- [Marker](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/marker): The Marker component.
- [Menu](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/menu): The Menu component.
- [Message](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/message): The Message component.
- [Select](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/select): The Select component.
- [Separator](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/separator): The Separator component.
- [Spinner](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/spinner): The Spinner component.
- [Switch](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/switch): The Switch component.
- [Table](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/table): The Table component.
- [Tabs](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/tabs): The Tabs component.
- [Textarea](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/components/textarea): The Textarea component.

## Charts
- [Area Chart](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/charts/area-chart): The Area Chart component.
- [Bar Chart](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/charts/bar-chart): The Bar Chart component.
- [Line Chart](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/charts/line-chart): The Line Chart component.

## Utilities
- [Markdown](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/utilities/markdown): The Markdown component.
- [Scroll Fade](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/utilities/scroll-fade): The Scroll Fade component.
- [Shimmer](https://native.buridan.dev/docs/utilities/shimmer): The Shimmer component.
